tasks.subject: Task 1: Launcher-shim feasibility spike (gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Prove whether a small launcher can inject the schema association into each server at runtime (so `.lsp.json` needs no stamped absolute path), and decide Option 1 (shim) vs Option 2 (hosted URL).

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user ("develop option 1 first and test it and if it doesn't work properly, fallback to option 2"). Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** throwaway prototype in scratchpad (node shim per server + driver reusing lsp-smoke.mjs); record decision in docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-21-lsp-only-plugin-rename-design.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] JSON shim injects schema from argv, validates from non-plugin cwd, no stamped path
- [ ] lemminx shim confirmed the same way against XML ribbon fixtures
- [ ] Option 1 vs 2 decision recorded in the spec with evidence

**Verify:** node <spike-driver> --plugin-root <abs> --cwd <other-dir> flags bad fixture (non-zero), passes good (zero), for both servers.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-21-lsp-only-plugin-rename-design.md"], "verifyCommand": "node <spike-driver> --plugin-root <abs> --cwd <other-dir>", "acceptanceCriteria": ["JSON shim injects schema from argv, validates from non-plugin cwd, no stamped path", "lemminx shim confirmed the same way", "Option 1 vs 2 decision recorded in the spec with evidence"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "both-servers", "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Rename both plugins (atomic)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Move both plugin directories to the new names and update every reference in one coherent commit.

**Files:** git mv both dirs (→ dataverse-xml-lsp, cloud-flow-json-lsp); modify marketplace.json, both plugin.json, flow package.json + package-lock.json, flow schema $id, .claude/settings.json, .github/workflows/ci.yml, README.md, llms.txt, both docs/superpowers/specs/*.md, each plugin's README + docs/{codex,vscode,debugging}.md; delete both commands/setup.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] dirs moved via git mv (history preserved)
- [ ] manifests + version 2.0.0 + LSP-first descriptions updated
- [ ] flow npm name + schema $id updated
- [ ] settings key + CI paths updated; commands/ deleted
- [ ] grep old slugs returns only CHANGELOG 1.0.x

**Verify:** grep -rin --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -e dataverse-customization-xml -e power-automate-cloud-flow . → only CHANGELOG 1.0.x; then pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins" → pass.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".claude-plugin/marketplace.json", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/.claude-plugin/plugin.json", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/package.json", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/schemas/cloud-flow-clientdata.schema.json", ".claude/settings.json", ".github/workflows/ci.yml", "README.md", "llms.txt"], "verifyCommand": "grep -rin --exclude-dir=node_modules --exclude-dir=.git -e dataverse-customization-xml -e power-automate-cloud-flow . | grep -v CHANGELOG.md; pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dirs moved via git mv", "manifests + version 2.0.0 + descriptions updated", "flow npm name + schema $id updated", "settings key + CI paths updated, commands/ deleted", "grep old slugs returns only CHANGELOG 1.0.x"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: No-restamp schema resolution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Ship the mechanism chosen in Task 1 so the committed .lsp.json resolves its schema on every machine with no stamping, and remove the stamping step from setup.

**Files:** Option 1 (shim): create scripts/lsp-launch.mjs in both plugins; modify both .lsp.json (launch via shim with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} arg; remove stamped url); modify both Install-Plugin.ps1 (drop Set-LspSchemaPaths CC call); retire Set-LspSchemaPaths CC path. Option 2 (fallback): hosted https schema URL + handledSchemaProtocols.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] .lsp.json has no machine-local absolute path
- [ ] schema loads from a moved copy with no re-stamp
- [ ] Install-Plugin.ps1 no longer edits .lsp.json

**Verify:** from a temp copy, node scripts/lsp-launch.mjs <abs-plugin-root> --stdio driven by the smoke client flags the bad fixture, no stamping run.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/scripts/lsp-launch.mjs", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/scripts/lsp-launch.mjs", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/.lsp.json", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/.lsp.json", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/scripts/Install-Plugin.ps1", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/scripts/Install-Plugin.ps1"], "verifyCommand": "node plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/scripts/lsp-launch.mjs <abs-plugin-root> --stdio (driven by smoke client from a moved copy)", "acceptanceCriteria": [".lsp.json has no machine-local absolute path", "schema loads from a moved copy with no re-stamp", "Install-Plugin.ps1 no longer edits .lsp.json"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Move guidance to docs/guide.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Preserve the domain guidance the auto-triggering skill carried by moving it into a reference doc, before the skill is shrunk.

**Files:** create plugins/*/docs/guide.md; modify each docs/codex.md (repoint to guide.md) and README.md (pointer).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] XML guide.md has validate loop, ribbon recipe, XSD-caveats list, gotchas, schema-refresh
- [ ] flow guide.md has shape note, attach globs, Test-Json one-liner, gotchas
- [ ] each guide.md opens as the manual replacement note; codex.md + README point at it

**Verify:** grep -l "manual replacement for the old" plugins/*/docs/guide.md lists both; grep -r "guide.md" plugins/*/README.md plugins/*/docs/codex.md shows pointers.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/docs/guide.md", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/docs/guide.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/docs/codex.md", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/docs/codex.md", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/README.md", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -l \"manual replacement for the old\" plugins/*/docs/guide.md; grep -r \"guide.md\" plugins/*/README.md plugins/*/docs/codex.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["XML guide.md has the full moved guidance", "flow guide.md has the moved guidance", "guide preamble present; codex.md + README.md point at guide.md"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Shrink SKILL.md to tiny setup skill
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace each auto-triggering skill body with a tiny, no-description skill whose only job is to run setup.

**Files:** overwrite plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/SKILL.md and plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/SKILL.md.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] frontmatter has name: <plugin>-setup and NO description:
- [ ] body ~4 lines: what it is + install cmd (mention -UpdateVSCode) + reload/debugging + guide pointer
- [ ] reload lists the skill without a description, invocable as /<plugin>:<plugin>-setup

**Verify:** pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins" (Task 6 guard passes); manual /reload-plugins then /dataverse-xml-lsp:dataverse-xml-lsp-setup runs setup.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/SKILL.md", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/SKILL.md"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["frontmatter name is <plugin>-setup with NO description", "body ~4 lines: what it is + install cmd + reload/debugging + guide pointer", "reload lists skill without description, invocable as /<plugin>:<plugin>-setup"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Tests — raise to well-tested
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Lock the new behaviors with tests: no-description skill, setup idempotency, XML LSP smoke, shim resolution.

**Files:** create plugins/*/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1 and plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/scripts/lsp-smoke-xml.mjs + test; keep Validate-DataverseXml.Tests.ps1; extend LspConfig.Tests.ps1 for shim shape if needed.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] no-description skill guard passes both plugins
- [ ] idempotency test (Install-Plugin twice) passes (skip-guard when node/network unavailable)
- [ ] XML lemminx LSP smoke flags bad fixture, passes good
- [ ] validator test still passes; LSP not associated to wrapper roots (<forms>, <visualization>)

**Verify:** pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins" → all green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1", "plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/tests/SetupSkill.Tests.ps1", "plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/scripts/lsp-smoke-xml.mjs"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["no-description skill guard passes both plugins", "idempotency test passes", "XML lemminx LSP smoke flags bad fixture, passes good", "validator test still passes; LSP not associated to wrapper roots"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: CHANGELOG + final verification (gate)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Document the breaking 2.0.0 change and prove the whole restructure works end-to-end.

**USER-ORDERED GATE — NON-SKIPPABLE.** Requested by the user (north-star: "really good and well tested"). Close only after every acceptanceCriteria item is re-validated independently, with output captured.

**Files:** modify CHANGELOG.md (new top entry).

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] CHANGELOG 2.0.0 breaking entry: renames, LSP + no-description setup skill, guidance → docs/guide.md, setup command removed, re-stamp eliminated; reinstall + enabledPlugins migration note; no-auto-guidance consequence
- [ ] both Install-Plugin self-checks pass
- [ ] Invoke-Pester + ScriptAnalyzer green
- [ ] reload loads both, LSPs attach with no stamped path, setup skills listed without description + invocable

**Verify:** pwsh plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/scripts/Install-Plugin.ps1; pwsh plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/scripts/Install-Plugin.ps1; pwsh -c "Invoke-Pester plugins"; pwsh -c "Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path plugins -Recurse".

```json:metadata
{"files": ["CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "pwsh plugins/dataverse-xml-lsp/scripts/Install-Plugin.ps1; pwsh plugins/cloud-flow-json-lsp/scripts/Install-Plugin.ps1; pwsh -c \"Invoke-Pester plugins\"; pwsh -c \"Invoke-ScriptAnalyzer -Path plugins -Recurse\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["CHANGELOG 2.0.0 breaking entry with migration + consequence note", "both Install-Plugin self-checks pass", "Invoke-Pester + ScriptAnalyzer green", "reload loads both, LSPs attach with no stamped path, setup skills listed without description + invocable"], "userGate": true, "tags": ["user-gate"], "gateScope": "all", "modelTier": "standard"}
```
